title: HUIANER Artificial Phalaenopsis Flowers 4 Pcs, 15” Fake Silk Orchids with Stem Leaves for Valentine's Day Home Office Wedding Party Décor (White)
features: QUALITY MATERIALS: Our artificial flowers are made of silk and plastic. The stems can be bent or trimmed. Carefully crafted from high-quality materials for longevity and easy care.
PERFECT DECORATION: Fake phalaenopsis flowers look beautiful and vivid. Realistic and charming life-like looking flowers add bright, happy, vivid colors to your life. It's not easy to fade or fall.
EASY TO USE: Great for weddings, the wreaths, flower vine, stages, gardens, offices, dining rooms, craft projects, photography props, party and any other place that you want to decorate.
PACKAGE INCLUDES: You will get 4pcs phalaenopsis flowers bouquets. SIZE: Diameter of flower head: about 2.8-3.2", total length : 38cm/15''.
Warm Tips: Do not expose it under the sun for a long time to avoid fading. Please notice the exact items size and permit the color difference due to the monitor's brightness and contrast settings.
